artifact.content_preview:
NGIS PHASE 3 — SPRINT REVIEW MEETING MINUTES
Meeting Date: March 3, 2026
Time: 13:00–14:30 EST
Location: WebEx / Room 4C-12, Place du Portage III, Gatineau

Attendees:
- Alice Tran (Project Manager) — Chair
- Bob Morrison (Technical Lead)
- Carol Nguyen (Infrastructure Architect)
- Dave Chen (Security Specialist)
- Marie Lefebvre (Change Management)
- Farida Osei (QA Lead)

Regrets: Director Okafor (represented by Alice Tran)

---

1. SPRINT 6 REVIEW (Feb 17 – Mar 3, 2026)

Completed Items:
- AD

extracted_tasks.text: must be initiated immediately given his role as the
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: must be initiated immediately given his role as the

extracted_tasks.text: - AD Schema Extension deployed to test environment (Bob Morrison)
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: - AD Schema Extension deployed to test environment (Bob Morrison)

extracted_tasks.text: - Network topology design finalized for Sites B and C (Carol Nguyen)
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: - Network topology design finalized for Sites B and C (Carol Nguyen)

extracted_tasks.text: - User acceptance testing scripts drafted (Farida Osei)
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: - User acceptance testing scripts drafted (Farida Osei)

extracted_tasks.text: - Legacy application inventory completed — 14 apps catalogued (Dave Chen)
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: - Legacy application inventory completed — 14 apps catalogued (Dave Chen)

extracted_tasks.text: - PAW architecture documentation for SA&A package (blocked — see Item 3)
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: - PAW architecture documentation for SA&A package (blocked — see Item 3)

risks.description: Hardware delivery delay for Cisco Catalyst 9500 switches directly conflicts with the scheduled Site A migration window.

evidence_refs.excerpt: TechSupplier has confirmed a 2-week delay on Cisco Catalyst 9500 switches. Revised delivery is March 20. This threatens the March 18 migration window.

risks.description: Loss of critical technical expertise and single point of failure due to the potential resignation of the sole AD migration expert.

evidence_refs.excerpt: Bob Morrison has indicated he is exploring external opportunities and may be leaving SSC within 60 days... his role as the sole AD migration expert.

risks.description: Security Assessment & Authorization (SA&A) package is incomplete, leading to a TBS Audit finding and potential failure to receive Authority to Operate (ATO).

evidence_refs.excerpt: TBS Audit identified an ITSG-33 IA-5 finding... Dave Chen confirmed the PAW documentation was inadvertently omitted from the SA&A package.

risks.description: Technical debt and system failure risk due to reliance on a deprecated API scheduled for decommissioning shortly after the next sprint.

evidence_refs.excerpt: The current migration script relies on the deprecated "legacy-sync" API endpoint scheduled for decommission on April 1.

risks.description: Incomplete end-user communication plan may lead to poor adoption, user resistance, or confusion during the migration phase.
Potential for undiscovered bugs or integration issues in legacy applications as they have been catalogued but not yet tested against the new AD schema.

evidence_refs.excerpt: Legacy application inventory completed — 14 apps catalogued (Dave Chen)

risks.description: Risk of inadequate knowledge transfer; Carol Nguyen is an Infrastructure Architect and may not have the bandwidth or specific skillset to absorb the AD Migration Lead's full responsibilities.

evidence_refs.excerpt: Bob Morrison to complete knowledge transfer documentation... and hand off to Carol Nguyen.

risks.description: Project governance risk due to the absence of the Director at a critical juncture where hardware delays and resource losses are being identified.

evidence_refs.excerpt: Regrets: Director Okafor (represented by Alice Tran)
